_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: high-throughput kinome screen to identify kinases which, when suppressed, leads to decreased pathway activation using phosphorylated ribosomal S6 protein S240/244 (pS6) as a readout (assessed by decreased pS6 staining intensity)
details: Successfully used as readout for mTORC1 activation in immunofluorescence-based high-throughput kinome screen and immunoblotting analyses
